prompt:
A clean, modern editorial illustration for a tech LinkedIn post. Concept: "technical debt used to be friction; now it is a prompt — the codebase teaches the AI what to write next, and bad code multiplies at the speed of generation instead of human attention". Context for the model to understand the meaning: in LLM-assisted coding, the existing codebase is the context the model reads; a degraded codebase is seen by the model not as debt but as example, precedent, a style to continue — so tangled code reproduces itself, the system reproduces its own confusion.

Isometric 3D editorial style, corporate tech palette (deep navy background, teal and cyan accents, white), subtle grid background, professional, minimal, high detail, square 1:1 composition, no watermark, no logos.

Show a single TANGLED, KNOTTED CODE BLOCK as the central node — a chaotic cube/cluster of twisted code lines with frayed edges and an amber warning glow (this represents "technical debt"). A small, clean, minimal robotic AI agent (NOT a human, NOT an office scene) is READING that tangled block, with a scanner/eye beam falling on it. From the robot, a CIRCULAR FEEDBACK ARROW-LOOP flows back and multiplies into 3 smaller IDENTICAL tangled copies being generated and spat out — visually showing the system reproducing its own confusion at speed. A subtle lightning/velocity accent on the loop conveys "speed of generation".

On the LEFT edge, as a faint smaller BEFORE contrast (desaturated): a single tiny human figure slowly dragging ONE heavy tangled block by hand (friction = slow, manual, one at a time). A thin transition arrow leads left-to-right into the main scene (the AI multiplying many copies fast).

Keep it to a maximum of 5 visual blocks: (1) central tangled code node, (2) the AI agent reading it, (3) the circular feedback loop, (4) the 3 generated copies, (5) the small BEFORE human-dragging vignette on the left. Generous white space; emphasize the OUTCOME (the multiplying copies), not just the thesis. Icons of a single consistent isometric 3D style. A SINGLE amber accent reserved for the "debt/warning" elements; everything else navy/teal/cyan/white.

Do NOT include any office scene, business people, sales charts, wireframe spheres, or abstract beauty without meaning. Bold modern sans-serif text overlay reading exactly "TECH DEBT IS A PROMPT NOW", centered and clearly legible. Show ONLY this single headline — do NOT add any other labels, captions, callouts or annotations. Keep it to a maximum of 4 visual blocks.
